data.name: My Therapist is a Futanari
data.detailed_description:
Futa on Male

It feels like your life isn't going anywhere--like there's some kind of mental block standing in your way.
You take the first step towards making an improvement and set up an appointment with a therapist in your local area.

After putting it all out there in a "safe environment", you soon find yourself engaged in some very unconventional therapy.

Read through some pretty raunchy(erotic) dialogue, accompanied by spicy nude depictions.

Gameplay

Kinetic Visual Novel

H-Scenes
~5K words

Immerse yourself in the story by typing in your own name, then proceeding to read through a raunchy story from the first-person perspective.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz Pentium 4
  • 記憶體: 400 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
